title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 234.250 - Bridges to be toll-free, when
text:
234.250.  Bridges to be toll-free, when. — Provided that nothing in this law shall authorize or permit the collection of tolls on any bridge heretofore made toll-free or on any existing bridge on which tolls are not at present collected.
(RSMo 1939 § 8551)
